# Maintainer Release Checklist

- [ ] CI, Security, dependency range, clean-wheel, README, and formal security scan gates pass.
- [ ] Functional scientific-invariant and failure-recovery tests pass.
- [ ] WSL and narrow/normal terminal workflow manual smoke tests pass.
- [ ] Experimental safety and controlled-data limitations are reviewed.
- [ ] Version, changelog, CITATION, installation command, and tag agree.
- [ ] About, topics, social preview, branch protection, checks, and support routing are reviewed.
- [ ] Wheel, sdist, checksums, SBOM, and attestations are attached.
- [ ] PyPI and repository rename remain disabled unless separately approved.
